name: Hot Potato and Broccoli Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until tender, then dice them.
2. Cook the broccoli until tender.
3. Keep both dishes hot.
4. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and stir well to mix.
5. Pour the mixture over the vegetables and toss gently.
6. The salad can be served either hot or cold.
